rules: NEVER use text smaller than text-lg (18px) for body content.
Headings must be massive (text-6xl+). This is a presentation, not a blog post.
Labels and metadata should be text-sm minimum.
Increase line-height to 'leading-relaxed' or 'leading-loose' for all body text to fill vertical space.

instructions: Increase container padding from px-8/px-16 to px-16/px-24/px-32.
Ensure content area uses max-w-7xl or w-full to fill width.
Increase header/footer text sizes (label, page number) to text-sm.
CRITICAL: Fix vertical misalignment. Add 'items-center' to the flex-row container holding the two columns.
Increase main title 'Noteall' to text-7xl or text-8xl.
Increase subtitle/description to text-2xl/text-3xl.
Increase list items to text-xl or text-2xl.
Increase card padding and border width.
CRITICAL: Fix vertical misalignment. Add 'items-center' to the flex-row container.
Increase main title 'EchoMind' to text-7xl or text-8xl.
Stats grid: Increase numbers to text-5xl/text-6xl, labels to text-lg.
Feature list: Increase text to text-xl or text-2xl.
Use 'gap-16' between columns.
Make 'HOP.AGENCY' massive (text-4xl+).
Make main title 'AI as part of package...' MASSIVE (text-7xl to text-9xl).
Body text should be text-2xl or text-3xl.
Use more vertical space.
Grid cards need to be taller and have more padding (p-10).
Card titles: text-3xl. Card desc: text-xl.
Main Title: text-6xl+.
Contact info text size must be at least text-2xl.
Final 'HOP.AGENCY' logo should be huge.
Use gap-16 for layout separation.
Apply the 2x-2.5x font scale to ALL other slides (Context, Value, Emergent, Offer).
Ensure no slide feels empty. Use font size and spacing to fill the viewport comfortably.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Modify 'FCSlideContainer.jsx' to increase global padding and base font sizes.

3. Go through EACH slide component file (FCTitleSlide, FCContextSlide, FCValueSlide, FCBlocksSlide, FCNoteallSlide, FCEchoMindSlide, FCEmergentSlide, FCOfferSlide, FCFinalSlide) and apply the new typography scale and spacing rules.
4. Specifically for FCNoteallSlide (Slide 5) and FCEchoMindSlide (Slide 6), ensure you add 'items-center' to the flex container to fix the vertical alignment issue.
5. Do NOT change colors or the dark theme foundation.
6. Do NOT break the slide navigation or PDF generation logic.
